case_title: ANDREW PUSCHEL VS. ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED SEP-29-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,850.00 FILED BY PUSCHEL, ANDREW AS TO DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/30/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORP

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-25-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
